response.overview: Dreamlike narratives unfold in the shared space of the "Future Scenarios" workshop, which Fort Apache Cinema Teatro runs inside the Velletri prison. These workshops explore the activity of private and missing desire, inner vision, and the clash between rationality and the unconscious. According to Jorge Luis Borges, dreams are the most complex and ancient of literary genres. Dreams are the genesis of narrative. Starting from a reflection on the theme of dreams, with the participating actors, a kaleidoscope of visual narratives was constructed, episodes that explore the transience of time, the nightmare of death, distance from loved ones, and the trauma of psychic annihilation.
response.title: Sogni
